game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **殺戮の天使 (Angels of Death):** Angels of Death is a story-driven horror adventure game where players control Rachel, a 13-year-old girl, navigating a multi-floor, sealed building to escape with the help of a serial killer, Zack. Players explore 2D environments using tap-to-move controls or a virtual joystick, interacting with objects and characters by tapping them to gather clues, initiate dialogue, and solve environmental puzzles. Core gameplay involves solving 3-5 puzzles per floor, such as finding specific items, combining inventory objects, or activating mechanisms, which are crucial for unlocking new areas and progressing the linear narrative. Dialogue choices, presented as on-screen buttons, influence character interactions and occasionally impact immediate puzzle solutions, though the overall story progression remains fixed across its multiple episodes. Failure conditions include falling into traps or being caught by enemies, resulting in a game over and requiring a restart from the last auto-save checkpoint, with successful episode completion unlocking exclusive "next episode preview end cards."
game_info.description: You are Rachel, trapped in a mysterious sealed building. Navigate through dangerous floors, solve puzzles, find items, and avoid deadly traps to escape. Each floor presents environmental puzzles requiring careful observation and item combinations. Interact with objects to gather clues and unlock new areas. One wrong move could be fatal—stay alert and think carefully about your actions.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move Rachel left/right and climb up/down ladders
Space: Interact with objects, examine items, and solve puzzles
Z: Open/Close inventory to combine items
Shift: Sprint (move faster)
Enter: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement mechanics, collision detection, and simple interactions. Validates that Rachel can move around the environment, climb ladders, and interact with basic objects without errors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move Rachel in all directions, test ladder climbing, interact with nearby objects, and verify collision boundaries work correctly. Test inventory opening and basic item pickup.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Rachel should move smoothly, climb ladders correctly, interact with objects successfully, and collision detection should prevent passing through walls. No crashes or visual glitches should occur.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the optimal path to complete the game by solving all puzzles efficiently. This validates that the win condition is achievable and all game mechanics work together properly.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate through floors systematically, collect required items in optimal order, solve puzzles using the correct item combinations, avoid all traps, and reach the exit on the final floor.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The game should transition to GAME_OVER_WIN state after completing all floors. All puzzles should be solvable with available items, and the escape should be achievable within reasonable time.
